arien.name: Noble Blade
arien.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
Before the attack: You may move another
unit that is adjacent to the target 1 space.
~("Another unit" never includes you.)

arien.name: Ceremonial Blade
arien.description:
Target a hero adjacent to you.
Before the attack: You may move a minion
that is adjacent to the target 1 space.

arien.name: Spell Break
arien.description:
**This turn:** Enemy heroes in radius cannot
perform skill actions, except on gold cards.
~(Skill ::skill_silver:: is an action type. Other action types are unaffected.)

arien.name: Living Tsunami
arien.description:
Once per turn, before performing an
Attack action, you may move 1 space.

arien.name: Aspiring Duelist
arien.description:
Ignore all minion defense modifiers.
~(This includes your minions, as well as the enemy minions.)

arien.name: Dangerous Current
arien.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. Before the
attack: Up to 1 enemy hero in any of the
2 spaces in a straight line directly behind
the target discards a card, or is defeated.

arien.name: Liquid Leap
arien.description:
Place yourself into a space in range
without a spawn point and not adjacent
to an empty spawn point.

arien.name: Expert Duelist
arien.description:
Ignore all minion defense modifiers.
**This turn:** You are immune to attack actions
of all enemy heroes, except this attacker.

arien.name: Rogue Wave
arien.description:
Target a unit in range.
After the attack: You may an enemy
unit adjacent to you up to 2 spaces.

arien.name: Magical Current
arien.description:
Place yourself into a space in range
without a spawn point and not adjacent
to an empty spawn point.

arien.name: Slippery Ground
arien.description:
**This turn:** Enemies heroes adjacent
to you cannot fast travel, or move more
than 1 space with a movement action.

arien.name: Raging Stream
arien.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. Before the
attack: Up to 1 enemy hero in any of the
3 spaces in a straight line directly behind
the target discards a card, or is defeated.

arien.name: Arcane Whirlpool
arien.description:
Swap with an enemy minion in range.
~(Swap places with the target. This is not movement.)

arien.name: Master Duelist
arien.description:
Ignore all minion defense modifiers.
**This round:** You are immune to attack actions
of all enemy heroes, except this attacker.

arien.name: Violent Torrent
arien.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. Before the
attack: Up to 1 enemy hero in any of the 5
spaces in a straight line directly behind the
target discards a card, or is defeated.
May repeat once on a different unit.

arien.name: Stranger Tide
arien.description:
Place yourself into a space in
range without a spawn point.

arien.name: Deluge
arien.description:
**This turn:** Enemies in radius
cannot fast travel, or move more than
1 space with a movement action.

arien.name: Tidal Blast
arien.description:
Target a unit in range.
After the attack: You may push an enemy
unit adjacent to you up to 3 spaces.

arien.name: Ebb and Flow
arien.description:
Swap with aan enemy minion in range;
if it was adjacent to you, may repeact once.

bain.name: Dead or Alive
bain.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: You may give an enemy
hero in radius the ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker.
A hero with the Bounty marker spends
1 additional ::life_counters:: life counter when defeated.

bain.name: Side Quest
bain.description:
If you are adjacent to an enemy unit,
give a hero in radius a ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker.
A hero with the Bounty marker spends
1 additional ::life_counters:: life counter when defeated.

bain.name: Get over here!
bain.description:
Target a unit or a token in range and in a
straight line, with no obstacles between you
and the target. Move that target towards you
in a straight line, until you are adjacent.

bain.name: A Complicated Profession
bain.description:
After you give a hero the ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker,
that hero discards a card.

bain.name: A Game of Chance
bain.description:
An enemy hero in radius with two or more
cards in hand chooses one of those cards.
Guess that card's color, then reveal it.
If you guessed correctly, discard that card;
otherwise you gain 1 coin.
~(You can only guess colors that could be in that player's hand.)

bain.name: Light Crossbow
bain.description:
Target a unit in range and in a straight line
with no other units or terrain between you.

bain.name: Close Call
bain.description:
If the hero in play has a ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker,
block the attack and that hero
gives the marker to you.
~(The marker's effect is applied to you.)

bain.name: Dead Man's Hand
bain.description:
An enemy hero in radius with two or more
cards in hand chooses one of those cards.
Guess that card's color, then reveal it.
If you guessed correctly, discard that card;
otherwise you gain 2 coins.

bain.name: Heavy Crossbow
bain.description:
Target a unit in range and in a straight line
with no units or terrain between you.

bain.name: Narrow Escape
bain.description:
If the hero in play has a ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker,
block the attack and retrieve the marker.

bain.name: Drinking Buddies
bain.description:
You may have a hero in radius retrieve a
discarded card. If they do, you may
also retrieve a discarded card.

bain.name: Hand Crossbow
bain.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a hero in range with
>a ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker.
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.

bain.name: Vantage Point
bain.description:
Ignore obstacles. If a hero in play has
a ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker, +1 ::movement_green:: movement.

bain.name: We're Not Done Yet!
bain.description:
An enemy hero in radius with two or more
cards in hand chooses one of those cards.
Guess that card's color, then reveal it.
If you guessed correctly, discard that card;
otherwise may repeat once or gain 2 coins.

bain.name: Arbalest
bain.description:
Target a unit in range and in a straight line
with no units or terrain between you.

bain.name: Perfect Getaway
bain.description:
If the hero in play has a ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker,
block the attack.

bain.name: Another One!
bain.description:
You may have a hero in radius retrieve a
discarded card. If they do, you may
also retrieve a discarded card.
**End of turn:** May repeat once.

bain.name: Hunter-Seeker
bain.description:
**Choose one, or both,** on different targets —
>>Target a hero in range with
>a ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker.
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.

bain.name: High Ground
bain.description:
Ignore obstacles. If a hero in play has
a ::marker_bounty:: Bounty marker, +2 ::movement_green:: movement.

brogan.name: Onslaught
brogan.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
Move into the space it occupied, if able.

brogan.name: Leap Forward
brogan.description:
Target a hero adjacent to you. After the attack:
Move into the space it occupied, if able.

brogan.name: Bulwark
brogan.description:
You may retrieve a discarded card.
**This turn:** You and friendly units in radius
cannot be moved, pushed, swapped
or placed by enemy heroes.

brogan.name: One Man Army
brogan.description:
During minion battle you count as a heavy
minion; if you would be removed,
lose the push instead.

brogan.name: Brutal Jab
brogan.description:
You may move 1 space. Push an enemy unit
or a token adjacent to you up to 1 space.

brogan.name: Mad Dash
brogan.description:
Before the attack: Move 2 spaces
in a straight line to a space adjacent to
an enemy unit, then target that unit.
~(If you cannot make this move, you cannot attack.)

brogan.name: Shield
brogan.description:
**This round:** When any friendly minion in radius
is defeated you may discard a silver card.
If you do, the minion is not removed.
~(The enemy hero still gains the coins for defeating the minion.)

brogan.name: Mighty Punch
brogan.description:
You may move 1 space. Push an enemy unit
or a token adjacent to you up to 2 spaces.

brogan.name: Bullrush
brogan.description:
Before the attack: Move 2 or 3 spaces in
a straight line to a space adjacent to an
enemy unit, then target that unit.

brogan.name: Bolster
brogan.description:
**This round:** When any friendly minion in radius
is defeated you may discard a silver card.
If you do, the minion is not removed.

brogan.name: Shield Bash
brogan.description:
An enemy hero adjacent to you who
has played an attack card this turn
discards a card, if able.

brogan.name: Throwing Axe
brogan.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>You may discard a card;
if you do, target a unit in range.

brogan.name: War Drummer
Savage Kick
brogan.description:
Move up to 2 spaces. Push an enemy unit
or a token adjacent to you up to 2 spaces.

brogan.name: Furious Charge
brogan.description:
Before the attack: Move 2, 3 or 4 spaces
in a straight line to a space adjacent to an
enemy unit, then target that unit.

brogan.name: Fortify
brogan.description:
**This round:** When any friendly minion in radius
is defeated you may discard a basic card.
If you do, the minion is not removed.

brogan.name: Counterattack
brogan.description:
An enemy hero adjacent to you who
has played an attack card this turn
discards a card, or is defeated.

brogan.name: Throwing Spear
brogan.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>You may discard a card. If you have a card
in the discard, target a unit in range.

brogan.name: Master Skald

brynn.name: Familiar Ground
brynn.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero in range who is
>adjacent to 3 or more obstacles.
~(You, other heroes, minions, tokens and terrain are obstacles.)

brynn.name: Home Turf
brynn.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero in range who is
>adjacent to 3 or more obstacles.
~(You, other heroes, minions, tokens and terrain are obstacles.)

brynn.name: Decoy
brynn.description:
**Choose up to two times,**, on different targets —
>>Move an enemy minion in radius 1 space.
>>Move an enemy hero in radius who is
adjacent to 3 or more obstacles 2 space.

brynn.name: High Ground
brynn.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
If you target a hero adjacent to
3 or more obstacles, +2 ::attack_red:: attack.

brynn.name: Tread Lightly
brynn.description:
Swap with either a unit adjacent to you,
or with an enemy hero in radius who is
adjacent to 3 or more obstacles.

brynn.name: Bear Trap
brynn.description:
**Choose one —**
>>An enemy hero adjacent to you discards
>a card, if able.
>>An enemy hero in radius who is adjacent to
3 or more obstacles discards a card, if able.

brynn.name: Elevated Ambush
brynn.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
If you target a hero adjacent to
3 or more obstacles, +2 ::attack_red:: attack.

brynn.name: Split Attack
brynn.description:
Target a unit in range. If you target a hero
who is adjacent to 3 or more obstacles, may
repeat once on a different unit adjacent to you.

brynn.name: Log Trap
brynn.description:
**Choose one —**
>>An enemy hero adjacent to you discards
>a card, if able.
>>An enemy hero in radius who is adjacent to
3 or more obstacles discards a card, if able.

brynn.name: True Grit
brynn.description:
You may retrieve a discarded attack card.
If an enemy hero in radius is adjacent to
3 or more obstacles, move up to 3 spaces.

brynn.name: Cover Tracks
brynn.description:
Swap with either a unit adjacent to you,
or with an enemy hero in radius who is
adjacent to 3 or more obstacles.
You may move 1 space.

brynn.name: Mountain Guide
brynn.description:
You may move a friendly unit, which is adjacent
to you, up to 3 spaces. If an enemy hero in
radius is adjacent to 3 or more obstacles, move
a different friendly unit in radius up to 2 spaces.

brynn.name: Deadfall Trap
brynn.description:
**Choose one —**
>>An enemy hero adjacent to you discards
>a card, or is defeated.
>>An enemy hero in radius who is adjacent to
3 or more obstacles discards a card, or is defeated.

brynn.name: Die Hard
brynn.description:
You may retrieve a discarded attack card.
If an enemy hero in radius is adjacent to
3 or more obstacles, move up to 4 spaces.

brynn.name: Hide Traces
brynn.description:
Swap with either a unit adjacent to you,
or with an enemy hero in radius who is
adjacent to 3 or more obstacles.
Move up to 2 spaces.

brynn.name: Expedition Leader
brynn.description:
You may move a friendly unit, which is adjacent
to you, up to 3 spaces. If an enemy hero in
radius is adjacent to 3 or more obstacles, move
a different friendly unit in radius up to 3 spaces.

brynn.name: Peak Precision
brynn.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
If you target a hero adjacent to
3 or more obstacles, +2 ::attack_red:: attack and After
the attack: You may retrieve this card.

brynn.name: Split Throw
brynn.description:
Target a unit in range. If you target a hero
who is adjacent to 3 or more obstacles,
may repeat once on a different unit.

brynn.name: Over the Top
brynn.description:
While you are performing actions, all
enemy heroes in play count as being
adjacent to 3 or more obstacles.

cutter.name: Walk the Plank
cutter.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Push an enemy hero adjacent to you
>up to 4 spaces; if that hero is pushed
>into another zone, that hero discards
>a card, or is defeated.
>>Defeat a minion adjacent to you.

cutter.name: Few More Steps
cutter.description:
Push an enemy hero adjacent to you
up to 3 spaces; if that hero is pushed
into another zone, that hero discards
a card, or is defeated.

cutter.name: Grappling Bolt
cutter.description:
Target an obstacle in range and in a straight
line, with no obstacles between you; ignore
immunity. Move in a straight line towards
that obstacle until you are adjacent to it.

cutter.name: Legend of the Skies
cutter.description:
The first time each turn after you perform a
primary action, you may perform the primary
action of a card in the previous turn slot.

cutter.name: Bombardment
cutter.description:
A enemy hero in radius, adjacent to
another enemy unit and not adjacent
to you, discards a card, if able.

cutter.name: Daring Strike
cutter.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Before the attack: Move 1 space.
Target a unit adjacent to you in the
direction of the move; +2 ::attack_red:: Attack.
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.

cutter.name: Brace for Impact
cutter.description:
Move 3 spaces in a straight line, ignoring
obstacles, to a space adjacent to an enemy
hero; that hero discards a card, if able.

cutter.name: Barrage
cutter.description:
A enemy hero in radius, adjacent to
another enemy unit and not adjacent
to you, discards a card, if able.

cutter.name: Bold Thrust
cutter.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Before the attack: Move 1 or 2 spaces in a
straight line. Target a unit adjacent to you
in the direction of the move; +2 ::attack_red:: Attack.
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.

cutter.name: Ramming Speed
cutter.description:
Move 3 or 4 spaces in a straight line, ignoring
obstacles, to a space adjacent to an enemy
hero; that hero discards a card, if able.

cutter.name: X Marks the Spot
cutter.description:
An enemy hero in radius **chooses one —**
>>You place that hero in a space in radius.
>>You gain 2 coins.

cutter.name: Evasive Shot
cutter.description:
Target a unit in range in a straight line
After the attack: Move up to 2 spaces
in the opposite direction.

cutter.name: Outmaneuver
cutter.description:
Swap with an enemy minion in radius;
you may move that minion up to 2 spaces.

cutter.name: Broadside
cutter.description:
A enemy hero in radius, adjacent to
another enemy unit and not adjacent
to you, discards a card, if able.
May repeat once on a different target.

cutter.name: Fearless Lunge
cutter.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Before the attack: Move 1, 2 or 3 spaces in
>a straight line. Target a unit adjacent to you
>in the direction of the move; +2 ::attack_red:: Attack.
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.

cutter.name: Crashland
cutter.description:
Move 3, 4 or 5 spaces in a straight line,
ignoring obstacles, to a space adjacent to an
enemy hero; that hero discards a card, if able.

cutter.name: A Fistful of Coins
cutter.description:
An enemy hero in radius **chooses one —**
>>You place that hero in a space in radius.
>>You gain 3 coins. If you have 13 or more
>coins, you alone win the game.

cutter.name: Tumble Shot
cutter.description:
Target a unit in range in a straight line.
After the attack: Move up to 3 spaces
in the opposite direction.

cutter.name: Outsmart
cutter.description:
Swap with an enemy minion in radius;
you may move that minion up to 3 spaces.

dodger.name: Dread Razor
dodger.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.
>>If you are adjacent to an empty spawn point
>in the battle zone, target a unit in range.

dodger.name: Rusty Razor
dodger.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>If you are adjacent to an empty spawn point
>in the battle zone, target a hero in range.

dodger.name: Death Trap
dodger.description:
An enemy hero in radius who is
adjacent to an empty spawn point in
the battle zone, discards a card, if able.

dodger.name: Tide of Darkness
dodger.description:
While you are performing an action, all spaces
count as if they are in the battle zone and
havd a friendly minion spawn point.

dodger.name: Shield of Decay
dodger.description:
+2 ::defense_blue:: Defense if there are 2 or more empty
spawn points in radius in the battle zone.

dodger.name: Littlefinger of Death
dodger.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero in range who has one or
>more cards in the discard.

dodger.name: Dark Ritual
dodger.description:
If there are 2 or more empty spawn points
in radius in the battle zone, gain 1 coin.

dodger.name: Vampiric Shield
dodger.description:
+2 ::defense_blue:: Defense if there are 2 or more empty
minion spawn points in radius in the battle zone.

dodger.name: Finger of Death
dodger.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero in range who has one or
>more cards in the discard.

dodger.name: Darker Ritual
dodger.description:
If there are 2 or more empty spawn points
in radius in the battle zone, gain 2 coins.

dodger.name: Weakness
dodger.description:
**This turn:** Enemy heroes
in radius have -4 ::attack_silver:: Attack.
~(They can still attack, even with a negative attack value.)

dodger.name: Burning Skull
dodger.description:
Target a unit in range. After the attack:
Move up to 1 minion adjacent to you
1 space, to a space not adjacent to you.

dodger.name: Necromancy
dodger.description:
Respawn a friendly minion in an empty friendly
spawn point adjacent to you in the battle zone.

dodger.name: Aegis of Doom
dodger.description:
+4 ::defense_blue:: if there are 2 or more empty
spawn points in radius in a battle zone.

dodger.name: Middlefinger of Death
dodger.description:
**Choose one, or both, on different targets —**
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero in range who has one or 
>more cards in the discard.

dodger.name: Darkest Ritual
dodger.description:
If there are 2 or more empty spawn points in
radius in the battle zone, gain 2 coins. If you
have your Ultimate, gain an ::attack_silver:: Attack item.
~(Use any spare card from the box with the corresponding icon.)

dodger.name: Enfeeblement
dodger.description:
**This turn:** Enemy heroes in radius have
-6 ::attack_silver:: Attack and cannot repeat actions.

dodger.name: Blazing Skull
dodger.description:
Target a unit in range. After the attack:
Move up to 2 minions adjacent to you
1 space each, to spaces not adjacent to you.

dodger.name: Necromastery
dodger.description:
Respawn a friendly minion in an empty friendly
spawn point in radius in the battle zone.

emmitt.name: Reverse Time
emmitt.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
**Next turn:** Heroes with lower initiative act
before heroes with higher initiative;
this effect ignores immunity.
~(Resolve ties as normal.)

emmitt.name: Tear in Time
emmitt.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: **Next turn:** Heroes with
lower initiative act before heroes with higher
initiative. This effect ignores immunity.

emmitt.name: Unstable Timeline
emmitt.description:
Place 2 ::token_glitch:: Glitch tokens in radius, with at
least two spaces between each token;
if used as a defense, place 3 tokens instead.
An enemy hero in play chooses one of the
Glitch tokens; you swap with that token.
**End of turn:** Remove all Glitch tokens.

emmitt.name: Alternative Timelines
Time Snare
emmitt.description:
An enemy hero in range who has
already resolved a card this turn
discards a card, if able.

emmitt.name: Temporal Punch
emmitt.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you; when defending,
the enemy hero must use the ::initiative:: Initiative
value of their card and items instead of the
::defense_silver:: Defense value of their card and items.
~(Minion defense modifiers are applied as normal.)

emmitt.name: Time Walk
emmitt.description:
Move an enemy hero in range, who
remained in the same space since
the last turn, 2 spaces in a straight line.

emmitt.name: Time Trap
emmitt.description:
An enemy hero in range who has
already resolved a card this turn
discards a card, if able.

emmitt.name: Time Loop
emmitt.description:
Swap with an enemy hero in range
who has already resolved a card this turn.

emmitt.name: Temporal Slam
emmitt.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you; when defending,
the enemy hero must use the ::initiative:: Initiative
value of their card and items instead of the
::defense_silver:: Defense value of their card and items.

emmitt.name: Flashback
emmitt.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
You may place 3 ::token_glitch:: Glitch tokens in radius,
with at least two spaces between each token;
if you do, up to 1 enemy hero in radius
swaps with a Glitch token of their choice.
**End of turn:** Remove all Glitch tokens.

emmitt.name: Fast Forward
emmitt.description:
Move an enemy hero in range, who
remained in the same space since
the last turn, 2 spaces in a straight line.

emmitt.name: Time Capsule
emmitt.description:
You, and friendly heroes in radius, may
retrieve all cards discarded this turn.

emmitt.name: Time Bomb
emmitt.description:
An enemy hero in range who has
already resolved a card this turn
discards a card, or is defeated.

emmitt.name: Time Warp
emmitt.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Swap with an enemy hero in range who
>has already resolved a card this turn.
>>An enemy hero in range swaps their
>unresolved card with one of their
>resolved cards of their choice.

emmitt.name: Temporal Judgement
emmitt.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you; when defending,
the enemy hero must use the ::initiative:: Initiative
value of their card and items instead of the
::defense_silver:: Defense value of their card and items.

emmitt.name: Deja Vu
emmitt.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
You may place 2 ::token_glitch:: Glitch tokens in radius,
with at least two spaces between each token;
if you do, up to 1 enemy hero in radius
swaps with a Glitch token of their choice.
**End of turn:** Remove all Glitch tokens.

emmitt.name: Back to the Future
emmitt.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Place a unit in range into the space where
that unit was at the start of this turn.
>>Move an enemy hero in range, who
>remained in the same space since
>the last turn, 2 spaces in a straight line.

emmitt.name: Future Proof
emmitt.description:
**Choose one —**
>>You, and friendly heroes in radius, may
>retrieve all cards discarded this turn.
>>**This turn:** Friendly heroes in radius
are immune to enemy actions.

garrus.name: Angry Strike
garrus.description:
Target a hero adjacent to you.
+1 ::attack_gold:: Attack for every card in your discard.

garrus.name: Angry Swipe
garrus.description:
Target a hero adjacent to you.
+1 ::attack_gold:: Attack for every card in your discard.

garrus.name: Chilling Howl
garrus.description:
You may discard one of your resolved cards.
**This round:** Enemy heroes in radius
cannot fast travel, or move more than
2 spaces with a movement action.

garrus.name: Battle Fury
garrus.description:
Each time after one of your resolved cards is
discarded, you may perform its primary action.

garrus.name: Menace
garrus.description:
Move an enemy unit in range 1 space
to a space farther away from you.

garrus.name: Trace
garrus.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Before the attack: If you have one or more
cards in the discard, you may move 1 space.
>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.

garrus.name: Hold Ground
garrus.description:
If there at least two enemy heroes in
radius, you may retrieve a discarded card.

garrus.name: Threaten
garrus.description:
Move an enemy unit in range 1 space
to a space farther away from you.
May repeat once.

garrus.name: Chase
garrus.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Before the attack: If you have one or more
cards in the discard, move up to 2 spaces.
>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.

garrus.name: Make a Stand
garrus.description:
If there are at least two enemy heroes in
radius, you may retrieve a discarded card.

garrus.name: Form Up!
garrus.description:
Move a friendly unit in range 1 space
to a space closer to you.
May repeat once.

garrus.name: Blunt Force
garrus.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: You may move 1 space to a
space adjacent to an enemy hero; if you do,
push that hero 3 spaces, ignoring obstacles.

garrus.name: Light Pilum
garrus.description:
An enemy hero in range discards a card,
if able. You may move 1 space.

garrus.name: Terrify
garrus.description:
Move an enemy unit in range 1 space
to a space farther away from you.
May repeat up to two times.

garrus.name: Hunt Down
garrus.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Before the attack: If you have one or more
cards in the discard, move up to 3 spaces.
>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.

garrus.name: Battle Ready
garrus.description:
If there are at least two enemy heroes
in radius, you may retrieve up to
two discarded cards.

garrus.name: Testudo!
garrus.description:
Move a friendly unit in range 1 space
to a space closer to you.
May repeat up to two times.

garrus.name: Send Flying
garrus.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
you may move up to 2 spaces to a space
adjacent to an enemy hero; if you do, push
that hero 3 spaces, ignoring obstacles.

garrus.name: Heavy Pilum
garrus.description:
An enemy hero in range discards a card,
or is defeated. You may move up to 2 spaces.

gydion.name: Cantrip
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Shocking Grasp" ~(To repel a foe!)
>>"Magic Missile" ~(To blast at range!)
>>"Expeditious Retreat" ~(To dart a great distance!)

gydion.name: Cheap Trick
gydion.description:
Cast the "Expeditious Retreat"
spell in the spellbook.
~(To dart a great distance!)

gydion.name: Prepare Spells
gydion.description:
Add all spell cards to the spellbook. Only
Gydion can look at the cards in the spellbook.
As each spell is cast, remove it from the
spellbook faceup. The action on the spell card
is performed by the hero casting the spell.

gydion.name: Elementary Enchantment
gydion.description:
Cast the "Suggestion" spell in the spellbook.
~(Compel the opposing champion to take a few extra steps.)

gydion.name: Elementary Evocation
gydion.description:
Cast the "Burning Hands" spell in the spellbook.
~(Burn multiple opponents in near vicinity.)

gydion.name: Elementary Abjuration
gydion.description:
Cast the "Shield" spell in the spellbook.
~(The magic shield protects against mundane threats.)

gydion.name: Lesser Evocation
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Burning Hands"
>>"Fireball"
~(Wait for your allies to clear the area before hurling a fireball!)

gydion.name: Lesser Necromancy
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Vampiric Touch"
>>"Create Undead"
~(Harm your foe to heal yourself. Raise an undead servant.)

gydion.name: Greater Evocation
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Burning Hands"
>>"Fireball"
>>"Sunburst"
~(Sunburst's reach and power grows with every cast spell.)

gydion.name: Greater Necromancy
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Vampiric Touch"
>>"Create Undead"
>>"Energy Drain"
~(Drain energy from a foe in sight to restore your vitality.)

gydion.name: Lesser Enchantment
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Suggestion"
>>"Dominate Person"
~(Turn the dominated person against their own troops.)

gydion.name: Lesser Transmutation
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Midas Touch"
>>"Disintegrate"
~(Create gold. Turn objects and lesser creatures into dust.)

gydion.name: Greater Enchantment
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Suggestion"
>>"Dominate Person"
>>"Power Word Kill"
~(Command a weakened foe within earshot to perish instantly.)

gydion.name: Greater Transmutation
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Midas Touch"
>>"Disintegrate"
>>"Polymorph"
~(Polymorph enemies into creatures or objects and vice versa.)

gydion.name: Lesser Abjuration
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Shield"
>>"Banishment"
~(Touch anything to have it banished where you please.)

gydion.name: Lesser Conjuration
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Find Familiar"
>>"Dimension Door"
~(Summon a familiar to assist you. Travel to a faraway place.)

gydion.name: Greater Abjuration
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Shield"
>>"Banishment"
>>"Invulnerability"
~(Invulnerability makes you impervious to deadly perils.)

gydion.name: Greater Conjuration
gydion.description:
**Choose and cast one** spell in the spellbook —
>>"Find Familiar"
>>"Dimension Door"
>>"Cloud Kill"
~(Create a deadly cloud within distance to weaken your foe.)

gydion.name: The Archwizard
gydion.description:
Whenever you would add cards
to the spellbook, you may cast the
"Wish" spell in the spellbook instead.

hanu.name: Fight and Flight
hanu.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
If the target is not defeated, After the attack:
If able, move 3 spaces in a straight line.

hanu.name: Fight or Flight
hanu.description:
Target a hero adjacent to you.
If the target is not defeated, After the attack:
If able, move 3 spaces in a straight line.

hanu.name: Hurry up!

unresolved card of a hero in range to 11,
until it is resolved, or otherwise changes state.
~(This may change the initiative order and tie breakers.)

hanu.name: The Ultimate Trick
hanu.description:
You choose the next action, and how
it is performed, for a hero you
target with the "Hurry Up!".

hanu.name: Unexpected Journey
hanu.description:
Swap with an enemy hero in radius.
**This turn:** That hero is immune.
**End of turn:** Swap with that hero,
regardless of radius and immunity.

hanu.name: Helping Hand
hanu.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero in range, adjacent to your
>friendly hero.

hanu.name: Monkey Trick
hanu.description: Swap two friendly units in radius.

hanu.name: There and Back Again
hanu.description:
Swap with an enemy hero in radius.
**This turn:** That hero is immune.
**End of turn:** Swap with that hero,
regardless of radius and immunity.

hanu.name: Even the Odds
hanu.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero in range, adjacent to your
>friendly hero.

hanu.name: Monkey Twist
hanu.description: Swap two friendly heroes in radius.

hanu.name: This Way!
hanu.description:
A friendly hero in radius chooses a distance

spaces in the same direction of your choice.

hanu.name: Outnumber
hanu.description:

>>Target a unit adjacent to you.

>friendly hero.

hanu.name: Hear Nothing
hanu.description: Swap with an enemy hero in radius.

hanu.name: Safe Travels
hanu.description:

**This turn:** That hero is immune.
**End of turn:** Swap with that hero, regardless
of radius and immunity. You may move 1 space.

hanu.name: Trusted Sidekick
hanu.description:
**Choose one, or both,** in any order —
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.
>>Target a hero in range, adjacent to your
>friendly hero and not adjacent to you.

hanu.name: Monkey Business
hanu.description:
Swap two friendly units in radius.
You may move 1 space.

hanu.name: That Way!
hanu.description:
A friendly hero in radius chooses a distance
of 1, 2, or 3; move both of you that number of
spaces in the same direction of your choice.

hanu.name: Pile On
hanu.description:
**Choose one, or both,** in any order —
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.
>>Target a minion in range, adjacent to your
>friendly.

hanu.name: See Nothing
hanu.description:
Swap with an enemy hero in radius.
You may move 1 space.

::tiebreaker_blue::: Target a minion adjacent to you.
---

::tiebreaker_orange:: Place up to 3 magma tokens in radius.

::tiebreaker_orange:: Move an enemy hero in radius

ignatia.description:
::tiebreaker_blue::: Swap with a friendly unit in radius.

::tiebreaker_orange:: Move an enemy hero in radius

min.name: Fast as Lightning

resolved or discarded red card.

Each time after you perform an attack action,
you may repeat it once on a different target.

Holy Death Grenade

Place a Rock token in the space it occupied.
May repeat once on a different target.

mrak.name: Epicenter
mrak.description:
An enemy hero in radius adjacent to terrain,
or to a ::token_rock:: Rock token, discards a card, or is
defeated. May repeat once on a different target.

mrak.name: Rock Solid
mrak.description:
You may retrieve a discarded card.
**This round:** if you would discard a card from
your hand, you may discard this card instead;
you may discard this card to perform its
defense action, as if it was in your hand.

mrak.name: Rock and a Hard Place
mrak.description:
Once per turn, after you place one or more
::token_rock:: Rock tokens into one or more spaces
adjacent to one or more enemy heroes,
each of those heroes discards a card, if able.

nebkher.name: Mind Grip
nebkher.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Perform an action on the card in the previous
>turn slot of an enemy hero in range; if you
>would place any tokens, place ::token_illusion::
>Illusion tokens instead; skip giving markers.
>>Defeat a minion adjacent to you.

nebkher.name: Mind Probe
nebkher.description:
Perform the action on the card in the previous
turn slot of an enemy hero in range; if you
would place any tokens this way, place ::token_illusion::
Illusion tokens instead; do not use markers.

nebkher.name: Diabolical Laughter
nebkher.description:
Laugh diabolically;
if you do, **choose up to three times —**
>>Swap with an ::token_illusion:: Illusion token in radius.
>>Place an Illusion token in an adjacent space.
>>Swap two resolved cards of an enemy hero
>in radius, without canceling active effects.

nebkher.name: What the Hell Are You?
nebkher.description:
Each time after you laugh diabolically as part
of performing an action, all enemy heroes
in radius discard a card, or are defeated.

nebkher.name: Imbue Doubt
nebkher.description:
Name a color. **Next turn, after playing cards:**
An enemy hero in radius discards
a card of that color, if able.

nebkher.name: Phantasmal Sentry
nebkher.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a hero in range adjacent
>to an ::token_illusion:: Illusion token in range.
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.

nebkher.name: Fleeting Image
nebkher.description:
Place an ::token_illusion:: Illusion token in radius.
You may swap with an Illusion token in play.

nebkher.name: Time to Reconsider
nebkher.description:
Name a color. **Next turn, after playing cards:**
An enemy hero in radius discards
a card of that color, if able.

nebkher.name: Crack in Reality
nebkher.description:
Split the board into two sides with a straight
line of spaces drawn through your space.
**This turn:** Units on either side of the line
cannot interact with objects and spaces on the
other side of the line, as if they did not exist.
~(This includes movement, placement, radius-based effects, etc.)

nebkher.name: Phantasmal Warrior
nebkher.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Before the attack: Move an ::token_illusion:: Illusion token
>in range up to 1 space to a space adjacent
>to an enemy hero in range. Target that hero.
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.

nebkher.name: Twist Fate
nebkher.description:
Target a unit in range. After the attack:
You may swap an enemy unit in range
with an ::token_illusion:: Illusion token adjacent to you.

nebkher.name: Multiple Projections
nebkher.description:
Place up to 2 ::token_illusion:: Illusion tokens in radius.
You may swap with an Illusion token in play.

nebkher.name: Illusionary Force
nebkher.description:
Place up to 2 ::token_illusion:: Illusion tokens in radius.
**This round:** While you are performing
actions, all Illusion tokens count as both
tokens and friendly melee minions.

nebkher.name: An Illusion of Choice
nebkher.description:
Name a color. **Next turn, after playing cards:**
Up to two enemy heroes in radius each
discard a card of that color, if able.

nebkher.name: Shift Reality
nebkher.description:
Split the board into two sides with a straight
line of spaces drawn through your space.
**This turn:** Units on either side of the line
cannot interact with you, nor with objects
and spaces on the other side of the line,
as if they did not exist.

nebkher.name: Phantasmal Champion
nebkher.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Before the attack: Move an ::token_illusion:: Illusion token
>in range up to 2 spaces to a space adjacent
>to an enemy hero in range. Target that hero.
>>Target a unit adjacent to you.

nebkher.name: Devious Scheme
nebkher.description:
Target a unit in range. After the attack:
You may swap an enemy unit in range
with an ::token_illusion:: Illusion token in range.

nebkher.name: Master of Illusions
nebkher.description:
Place up to 3 ::token_illusion:: Illusion tokens in radius.
You may swap with an Illusion token in play.

nebkher.name: Illusionary Army
nebkher.description:
Place up to 3 ::token_illusion:: Illusion tokens in radius.
**This round:** While you are performing
actions, all Illusion tokens count as both
tokens and friendly melee minions.

razzle.name: Stunt Doubles
razzle.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
Spawn up to 3 more of you in radius; each of
you is the same hero, except when actions
are performed. If defeated, remove all of you.

razzle.name: Stunted Doubles
razzle.description:
Target a hero adjacent to you. After the attack:
Spawn up to 3 more of you in radius; each of
you is the same hero, except when actions
are performed. If defeated, remove all of you.

razzle.name: Crowd Control
razzle.description:
When used as a defense action, +2 ::defense_silver::
Defense for each other one of you in radius.
When used as a skill action,
remove all other you in play.

razzle.name: Twin Strike
razzle.description:
After you perform a basic attack action,
another one of you may repeat it once,
targeting a different unit.

razzle.name: Alleyoop
razzle.description:
Swap with a friendly hero in range.
Move another one of you up to 1 space.

razzle.name: Phantom Strike
razzle.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
If there is more than one of you in play,
you may remove one of you.

razzle.name: Tightrope
razzle.description:
After you move, you may move
another one of you 1 space.

razzle.name: Group Performance
razzle.description:
Swap with a friendly hero in range.
Move another one of you up to 2 spaces.

razzle.name: Hit and Gone
razzle.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
You may remove one or more of you
in play, except the last one of you.

razzle.name: High Wire
razzle.description:
After you move, move another
one of you up to 2 spaces.

razzle.name: Magic Trick
Rummage
razzle.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: If there is another one of you
in radius, you may retrieve a discarded card.
~(All of you share cards in hand, deck, and discard.)

razzle.name: Theatrics
razzle.description: Swap with a minion in range.

razzle.name: Team Spirit
razzle.description:
Swap with a friendly hero in range.
Move another one of you up to 3 spaces.

razzle.name: Into Thin Air
razzle.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
You may remove one or more of you
in play, including all of you.
~(If all are removed, you are not defeated. Respawn as normal.)

razzle.name: Wire Dancers
razzle.description:
After you move, move another
one of you up to 3 spaces.

razzle.name: Aaaand it's gone!
Ransack
razzle.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: For each other one of you
in radius, you may retrieve a discarded card.

razzle.name: Spectacle
razzle.description:
Swap with a minion in range.
May repeat once by another one of you,
targeting a different minion.

rowenna.name: Code of Chivalry
rowenna.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
Before the attack: If you target a hero,
both you and the target may
retrieve a discarded card.

rowenna.name: Earn the Spurs
rowenna.description:
Target a hero adjacent to you.
Before the attack: Both you and the target
may retrieve a discarded card.

rowenna.name: Throw the Gauntlet
rowenna.description:
Place yourself into a space in range adjacent
to an enemy hero in range; that hero may
move 1 space; if they do, gain 2 coins.

rowenna.name: Fabled Lance
rowenna.description:
All of your attack actions gain the "Ranged"
subtype, target a unit in range, and count
as having a printed ::range_purple:: Range value of 2.

rowenna.name: Stand Guard
rowenna.description:
Swap with a friendly unit in range
which is adjacent to an enemy hero,
or who has a card in the disacrd.

rowenna.name: Token of Gratitude
rowenna.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
A friendly hero in radius gains 1 coin.

rowenna.name: Close Quarters
rowenna.description:
After movement, if yhou are adjacent to
an enemy hero, you may **Choose one —**
>>Place a friendly minion in radius into a
>space adjacent to that enemy hero.
>>Place an enemy minion in radius into a
>space adjacent to you.

rowenna.name: Fair Share
rowenna.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
A friendly hero in radius gains 1 coin.

rowenna.name: Feat of Bravery
rowenna.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: A friendly hero in radius
may retrieve a discarded card.

rowenna.name: Melee
rowenna.description:
After movement, if you are adjacent to
an enemy hero, you may **Choose one —**
>>Place a friendly minion in radius into a
>space adjacent to that enemy hero.
>>Place an enemy minion in radius into a
>space adjacent to you.

rowenna.name: Opening Shots
rowenna.description:
If both you and an enemy hero in radius
have no cards in the discard, that hero
discards ac ard, if able.

rowenna.name: Protect the Weak
rowenna.description:
Swap with a friendly unit in range
which is adjacent to an enemy hero,
or who has a card in the discard.

rowenna.name: Accept Surrender
rowenna.description:
Defeat an enemy hero adjacent to
you with no cards in hand.

rowenna.name: Grand Melee
rowenna.description:
After movement, if you are adjacent to
an enemy hero, you may **Choose one —**
>>Place a friendly minion in radius into a
>space adjacent to that enemy hero.
>>Place an enemy minion in radius into a
>space adjacent to you.

rowenna.name: Opening Volley
rowenna.description:
If both you and an enemy hero in radius
have no cards in the discard, that hero
discards a card, if able. May repeat once.

rowenna.name: Defend the Innocent
rowenna.description:
Swap with a friendly unit in range
which is adjacent to an enemy hero,
or who has a card in the discard.
You may retrieve a discarded card.

rowenna.name: Glorious Triumph
rowenna.description:
Defeat an enemy hero adjacent to you
with no cards in hand; your friendly
heroes gain triple assist coins.

rowenna.name: Paragon of Grace
rowenna.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
A friendly hero in radius gains 1 coin.
May repeat once on a different target.

rowenna.name: Paragon of Valor
rowenna.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: A friendly hero in radius
may retrieve a discarded card; if they do,
you may repeat once on a different target.

sabina.name: Point Blank Shot
sabina.description:
Target a unit in range. After the attack:
If the target is adjacent to you, push it 1 space.

sabina.name: Bang
sabina.description:
Target a hero adjacent to you.
After the attack: Push the target 1 space.

sabina.name: Back to Back
sabina.description: Swap with a friendly minion in radius.

sabina.name: Big Sodding Gun
sabina.description:
Your basic attack has +2 ::range_gold:: Range and
+2 ::attack_gold:: Attack. If you push an enemy hero,
that hero discards a card, or is defeated.

sabina.name: Quickdraw
sabina.description:
Target a unit in range. +3 ::attack_red:: Attack if the
target played an attack card this turn.

sabina.name: Troop Movement
sabina.description:
Move a friendly minion in radius up to 1 space,
to a space in radius. May repeat once.

sabina.name: Gunslinger
sabina.description:
Target a unit in range. +3 ::attack_red:: Attack if the
target played an attack card this turn.

sabina.name: Marching Orders
sabina.description:
Move a friendly minion in radius 1 space,
to a space in radius. May repeat once.

sabina.name: Steady Advance
Shootout
sabina.description:
Target a unit in range. After the attack:
If the target was adjacent to you, remove
up to one enemy minion adjacent to you.
~(You gain no coins for removing a minion, only defeating.)

sabina.name: Close Support
sabina.description:
An enemy hero in radius adjacent to your
friendly minion discards a card, if able.

sabina.name: Ready and Waiting
sabina.description:
Swap two minions in radius,
ignoring heavy minion immunity.

sabina.name: Dead Shot
sabina.description:
Target a unit in range. +4 ::attack_red:: Attack if the
target played an attack card this turn.

sabina.name: Path to Victory
sabina.description:
Move a friendly minion in radius 1 space, to a
space in radius. May repeat up to two times.

sabina.name: Unwavering Resolve
Bullet Hell
sabina.description:
Target a unit in range. After the attack:
If the target was adjacent to you, remove
up to two enemy minions adjacent to you.

sabina.name: Covering Fire
sabina.description:
An enemy hero in radius adjacent to your
friendly minion discards a card, or is defeated.

silverarrow.name: Shoot and Scoot
silverarrow.description:
Target a unit at maximum range.
After the attack: If able, you may
fast travel to an adjacent zone.

silverarrow.name: Keep the Distance
silverarrow.description:
Target a hero at maximum range.
After the attack: If able, you may
fast travel to an adjacent zone.

silverarrow.name: Trailblazer
silverarrow.description:
You may fast travel, if able.
**This round:** You and friendly heroes
in radius may ignore obstacles while
performing movement actions.

silverarrow.name: Wild Hunt
silverarrow.description:
Each time before you perform an action,
you may move 2 spaces in a straight line.

silverarrow.name: Grasping Roots
silverarrow.description:
**This turn:** Enemy heroes in radius cannot
fast travel, or move more than 1 space
with a movement action.

silverarrow.name: Snap Shot
silverarrow.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a unit in range, which is not
>adjacent to any other unit.
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.

silverarrow.name: Disorient
silverarrow.description:
Move an enemy unit adjacent to you 1 space;
if you do, you may move 1 space.

silverarrow.name: Entangling Vines
silverarrow.description:
**This turn:** Enemy heroes in radius cannot
fast travel, or move more than 1 space
with a movement action.

silverarrow.name: Opportunity Shot
silverarrow.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a unit in range, which is not
>>adjacent to any other unit.
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.

silverarrow.name: Divert Attention
silverarrow.description:
Move an enemy unit adjacent to you up
to 2 spaces; if you do, move up to that
number of spaces in a straight line.

silverarrow.name: Warning Shot
silverarrow.description:
**End of turn:** An enemy hero in radius
discards a card, if able.

silverarrow.name: Long Shot
silverarrow.description: Target a unit at maximum range.

silverarrow.name: Fae Healing
silverarrow.description:
A hero  in radius may retrieve a discarded
card; if they do, that hero gains 1 coin.

silverarrow.name: Grappling Branches
silverarrow.description:
**This turn:** Enemy heroes in radius cannot
fast travel, or move more than 1 space
with a movement action.

silverarrow.name: Clear Shot
silverarrow.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Target a unit in range, which is not
>adjacent to any other unit.
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.

silverarrow.name: Lead Astray
silverarrow.description:
Move an enemy unit adjacent to you up
to 3 spaces; if you do, move up to that
number of spaces in a straight line.

silverarrow.name: Treetop Sentinel
silverarrow.description:
**End of turn:** An enemy hero in radius
discards a card, or is defeated.

silverarrow.name: Rain of Arrows
silverarrow.description:
Target a unit at maximum range.
If you target a hero, repeat once on a different
hero; if you do, may repeat once on a minion.

silverarrow.name: Nature's Blessing
silverarrow.description:
A hero in radius may retrieve a discarded
card; if they do, that hero gains 2 coins.

snorri.name: Rune Sigils
Rune Shards
Inscribe the Runes
snorri.description:
Give yourself 4 ::rune_axe_marker::::rune_bird_marker::::rune_anvil_marker::::rune_horn_marker:: Rune markers
and place one below each of your turn slots.
A rune is active as long as it is below the
turn slot matching the current turn.
Rune markers are not removed at the
end of round, nor if you are defeated.

snorri.name: Rune Mastery
snorri.description:
Each time you perform an action, choose
one inactive rune; that rune counts as
a second rune for this action.

snorri.name: Safe Passage
snorri.description:
If the ::rune_bird:: rune is active,
**This turn:** You may ignore obstacles.

snorri.name: Runic Dagger
snorri.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: If the ::rune_anvil:: rune is active,
you may retrieve a discarded card.

snorri.name: Oath of Endurance
snorri.description:
If a rune is active:
::rune_horn::: Block a basic attack.
::rune_axe::: Block a non-ranged attack.
**This Turn:** You are immune to enemy actions.

snorri.name: Hidden Passage
snorri.description:
If a rune is active:
::rune_bird::: **This turn:** You may ignore obstacles.
::rune_anvil::: **This turn:** You are immune to enemy
actions.

snorri.name: Ancestral Boon
snorri.description:
If a rune is active,
a friendly hero in radius may:
::rune_axe::: Swap a resolved card with a card in hand.
::rune_anvil::: Retrieve all their discarded cards.

snorri.name: Runic Hammer
snorri.description:
Before the atack: if the ::rune_horn:: rune
is active, you may move 1 space.
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: If the ::rune_anvil:: rune is active,
you may retrieve a discarded card.

snorri.name: Runecaster
snorri.description:
Target a unit at maximum range.
After the attack: If a rune is active:
::rune_horn::: Move up to 2 spaces.
::rune_axe::: An enemy hero who was adjacent to the
target discards a card, or is defeated.

snorri.name: Oath of Fortitude
Runetrap
snorri.description:
If a rune is active, an enemy hero in radius:
::rune_horn::: Discards a green card, if able.
::rune_axe::: Discards a silver card, if able.
::rune_anvil::: Discards a blue card, if able.

snorri.name: Deep Passage
snorri.description:
If a rune is active:
::rune_bird::: **This turn:** You may ignore obstacles.
::rune_anvil::: **This turn:** You are immune to enemy
actions.
::rune_horn::: Gain +2 ::movement_blue:: Movement.

snorri.name: Ancestral Grace
snorri.description:
If a rune is active,
a friendly hero in radius may:
::rune_axe::: Swap a resolved card with a card in hand.
::rune_anvil::: Retrieve all their discarded cards.
::rune_bird::: Swap one of their items with an item on
their card of the same tier and color.

snorri.name: Runic Battleaxe
snorri.description:
Before the atack: if the ::rune_horn:: rune
is active, you may move 1 space.
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: If a rune is active:
::rune_axe::: May repeat once on an enemy minion.
::rune_anvil::: You may retrieve a discarded card.

snorri.name: Runeblaster
snorri.description:
If the ::rune_bird:: rune is active, target a unit in range,
otherwise target a unit at maximum range.
After the attack: If a rune is active:
::rune_horn::: Move up to 2 spaces.
::rune_axe::: An enemy hero who was adjacent to the
target discards a card, or is defeated.

snorri.name: Oath of Perseverance
Runebomb
snorri.description:
Choose one active rune; depending on
that rune, an enemy hero in radius:
::rune_horn::: Discards a green card, if able.
::rune_axe::: Discards a silver card, if able.
::rune_anvil::: Discards a blue card, if able.
::rune_bird::: Discards a gold card, if able.

swift.name: Reload!
swift.description:
**Choose one —**
>>Perform the primary action of your
>rightmost resolved card.
>>Defeat a minion adjacent to you.

swift.name: Backup
swift.description:
Perform the primary action of your rightmost
resolved card. If you perform an Attack
action this way, you cannot target minions.

swift.name: Bounce
swift.description:
Move 2 spaces in a straight line, ignoring
obstacles; if this card is already resolved as
you perform this action, may repeat once.

swift.name: Bullet Time
swift.description:
After you resolve a basic card, you may
perform the primary action on that card;
you cannot target the same enemy hero
twice in the same turn this way.

swift.name: Steam Jump
swift.description:
Place yourself into a space in a straight
line in radius. Push an enemy unit
adjacent to you up to 1 space.

swift.name: Snipe
swift.description:
Target a unit at maximum range,
and in in a straight line.

swift.name: Suppress
swift.description:
An enemy hero in radius who is not
adjacent to terrain discards a card, if able.

swift.name: Assault Jump
swift.description:
Place yourself into a space in a straight
line in radius. Push an enemy unit
adjacent to you up to 2 spaces.

swift.name: Prepared Shot
swift.description:
Target a unit in range, in a straight
line, and not adjacent to you.

swift.name: Pin Down
swift.description:
An enemy hero in radius who is not
adjacent to terrain discards a card, if able.

swift.name: Delayed Jump
swift.description:
**End of turn:** Place yourself into a space
in radius not in a straight line from you.

swift.name: Shotgun
swift.description:
Target a unit in range. Before the attack:
An enemy hero adjacent to the target
discards a card, if able.

swift.name: Mark for Death
swift.description:
Move an enemy minion in radius up
to 3 spaces to a space in radius.
**Next turn:** The first time an enemy minion
in radius is defeated, gain 1 coin.

swift.name: Drop Trooper
swift.description:
Place yourself into a space in a straight line
in radius. Push up to two enemy units
adjacent to you up to 2 spaces.

swift.name: Killshot
swift.description:
Target a unit in range, in a straight
line, and not adjacent to you.

swift.name: Killing Ground
swift.description:
An enemy hero in radius who is not adjacent
to terrain discards a card, or is defeated.

swift.name: Mobile Scout
swift.description:
**End of turn:** Place yourself into a space in
radius not in a straight line from you.
You may then fast travel, if able.

swift.name: Super-Shotgun
swift.description:
Target a unit in range. Before the attack:
An enemy hero adjacent to the target
discards a card, or is defeated.

swift.name: Hunting Season
swift.description:
Move up to two enemy minions in radius,
up to 3 spaces each, to spaces in radius.
**Next turn:** The first two times an enemy
minion in radius is defeated, gain 1 coin.

takahide.name: Float like a Butterfly
takahide.description:
Swap this card with a different
gold card in your deck.
~(This card starts the game in your hand.)

takahide.name: Sting like a Bee
takahide.description:
Target a unit at maximum range.
After the attack: Swap this card with
a different gold card in your deck.
~(This card starts the game in your deck.)

takahide.name: Strike like a Tiger
takahide.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: Swap this card with
a different gold card in your deck.
~(This card starts the game in your deck.)

takahide.name: Bushido
takahide.description:
Swap your gold card with a different
gold card in your deck; if you swap a
resolved or discarded card this way,
place the new card facedown.

takahide.name: Shameful Display
takahide.description: ~(You are defeated.)

takahide.name: Set an Example
takahide.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
A friendly hero in radius may swap their
unresolved card with a card in their hand.

takahide.name: Proven Warrior
takahide.description:
Choose a card in the discard of a friendly
hero in radius. An enemy hero in radius
discards a card of the same color, if able.

takahide.name: Come to Aid
takahide.description:
A friendly hero in range may discard a card.
If that hero has a card in the discard,
you may move up to 3 spaces.

takahide.name: Lead from the Front
takahide.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
A friendly hero in radius may swap their
unresolved card with a card in their hand.

takahide.name: Spinning Blade
takahide.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. After the attack:
**This turn:** Empty spaces adjacent to you
count as obstacles for enemy units.

takahide.name: Hold my Sake
takahide.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: A friendly hero in radius
may swap their unresolved card with
a card in their hand, or in their discard.

takahide.name: Blade Helix
takahide.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: **This turn:** Empty spaces in
radius count as obstacles for enemy units.

takahide.name: Chosen Champion
takahide.description:
Choose a card in the discard of a friendly
hero in radius. An enemy hero in radius
discards a card of the same color, if able.

takahide.name: Calculated Risk
takahide.description:
A friendly hero in radius may discard an
attack card. If that hero has a card in the
discard, that hero may move up to 2 spaces.

takahide.name: The Right Hand
takahide.description:
Choose a card in the discard of a friendly
hero in radius. Up to two enemy heroes in
radius discard a card of the same color, if able.

takahide.name: Tactical Gambit
takahide.description:
A friendly hero in radius may discard
an attack card. If that hero has a card
in the discard, that hero may move
up to 2 spaces, ignoring obstacles.

takahide.name: Bring the Relief
takahide.description:
A friendly hero in range may discard a card.
If that hero has a card in the discard,

>>Swap with a ::token_tree:: Tree token in radius.
>>Swap a friendly unit in radius with
>a Tree token in radius.

wuk.name: Abundance
wuk.description:
Remove a ::token_tree:: Tree token in radius.
**Choose one or both —**
>>You may retrieve a discarded card.
>>A friendly hero in radius may retrieve a
>discarded card.

wuk.name: Nature's Champion
wuk.description:
**Choose one, or both,** on different targets **—**
>>Target a hero adjacent to you.
>>Target a unit in range adjacent to
a ::token_tree:: Tree token.

wuk.name: Monstrous Throw
wuk.description:
Place a token, or an enemy unit,
adjacent to you into a space in range.
May repeat once.

wuk.name: Assert Dominance
wuk.description:
**This round:** Up to 1 enemy minion adjacent
to you does not count towards the minion total
during minion battle, regardless of immunity.

wuk.name: Angry Stampede
wuk.description:
If you move in a straight line: You may ignore
obstacles; each enemy hero you moved
through discards a card, or is defeated;
defeat up to two minions you moved through.

wuk.name: Treetop Ride
wuk.description:
**Choose up to two times —**
>>Swap with a ::token_tree:: Tree token in radius.
>>Swap a friendly unit in radius with
>a Tree token in radius.

xargatha.name: Cleave
xargatha.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you.
After the attack: May repeat once
on a different enemy hero.

xargatha.name: Desperate Cleave
xargatha.description:
Target a hero adjacent to you.
After the attack: May repeat once
on a different enemy hero.

xargatha.name: Siren's Call
xargatha.description:
Target an enemy unit not adjacent to you
and in range; if able, move that unit
up to 3 spaces to a space adjacent to you.

xargatha.name: Metamorphosis
xargatha.description:
Gain +1 ::movement_silver:: Movement and +1 ::initiative:: Initiative
for each enemy unit adjacent to you.
You may move through obstacles.

xargatha.name: Stone Gaze
xargatha.description:
**Next turn:** Enemy heroes in radius count
as both heroes and terrain, and cannot
perform movement actions.
~(If you move, the radius "moves" with you)

xargatha.name: Threatening Slash
xargatha.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. +1 ::attack_red:: Attack
for each other enemy unit adjacent to you.
~(Do not count the target when calculating the attack bonus.)

xargatha.name: Charm
xargatha.description:
Before or after movement, you may
move an enemy ranged minion
in radius up to 2 spaces.

xargatha.name: Petrifying Stare
xargatha.description:
**Next turn:** Enemy heroes in radius count
as both heroes and terrain, and cannot
perform movement actions.

xargatha.name: Deadly Swipe
xargatha.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. +2 ::attack_red:: Attack
for each other enemy unit adjacent to you.

xargatha.name: Control
xargatha.description:
Before or after movement, you may move
an enemy ranged or melee minion
in radius up to 2 spaces.

xargatha.name: Fresh Converts
xargatha.description:
If you are adjacent to an enemy minion,
you may retrieve a discarded card.

xargatha.name: Long Thrust
xargatha.description:
Target a unit in range. +1 ::range_red:: Range
for each enemy unit adjacent to you.

xargatha.name: Constrict
xargatha.description:
**End of round:** Defeat an enemy
melee minion adjacent to you.
~(Before the end of round minion battle.)

xargatha.name: Turn into Statues
xargatha.description:
**Next turn:** Enemy heroes in radius count
as both heroes and terrain, and cannot
perform movement actions.

xargatha.name: Lethal Spin
xargatha.description:
Target a unit adjacent to you. +3 ::attack_red:: Attack 
for each other enemy unit adjacent to you.

xargatha.name: Dominate
Devoted Followers
xargatha.description:
If you are adjacent to an enemy unit,
you may retrieve a discarded card.

xargatha.name: Rapid Thrusts
xargatha.description:
Target a unit in range. +1 ::range_red:: Range
for each enemy unit adjacent to you.
May repeat once on a different enemy hero.

xargatha.name: Final Embrace
xargatha.description:
**End of round:** Defeat an enemy melee
or ranged minion adjacent to you.
